profile_bio.description: 新NISAをキッカケに投信と株を始めたサラリーマンの記録。初心者。2030年までに金融資産1億円を達成するために試行錯誤中。投資信託をメインに米・国内株。国内IPO株も。暗号資産への少額の積立も継続中。

kept.text:
字节跳动今年GPU采购预算从1600亿上调至2300亿，CPU预算从700亿增至1000亿元。海外采购约1200亿（NVIDIA 65%、AMD 30%、Broadcom 5%），国内采购核心分三块：寒武纪250-300亿、华为昇腾220-230亿、自研芯片170-190亿。明年CAPEX可能再翻倍，GPU预算或达5000亿以上。

字节通过按照1:4的比例搭配采购国产芯片，换取NVIDIA H200和5090的配额，额外带动200多亿英伟达预算。

国产芯片全线满产满销，产能而非需求是瓶颈。自研卡走三星6nm代工，单卡成本3600-3700美元，芯原拿300-400美元设计服务利润。腾讯CAPEX激进到2800亿，给昆仑芯下了30万张卡的大单。2027年寒武纪订单至少500亿起。

最受益标的排序
第一梯队是寒武纪，确定性最高。690芯片今年量产全部被字节吃下，250-300亿保底预算，2027年翻倍至500亿以上，订单和收入完全不用担心，唯一变量是上游产能。

第二梯队是芯原股份，隐藏赢家。字节自研卡每张给芯原300-400美元利润，30万张就是近1亿美元增量。腾讯自研芯片也要走芯原到三星的通道，昆仑芯同样选择三星代工。芯原作为"通道公司"在国产自研芯片浪潮中卡位独特。

第三梯队是三星代工产业链受益方。字节、百度昆仑芯、腾讯自研全部押注三星，6nm产能成为稀缺资源。

profile_bio.description: Ex-quant & PM｜AI chip design｜Semis × Capital Markets｜Not Financial Advice

kept.text:
We cannot buy OpenAI or Anthropic as these companies are private. However, we can buy nearest proxies. 
Case in example - Mediatek. 
Anthropic is buying Google TPUs for their compute needs. Google has partnered with two vendors - Mediatek and Broadcom. While Broadcom story is well known, Mediatek was still looked as some old school mobile chip company. However, last few concalls gave enough hints of their ambitions to break into ASICs market and they landed Google as first big customer. 

Concalls had good vibes + valuations were cheap + earnings inflection was ahead. This creates lollapalooza 🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥

tweet.text:
The AI Compute Stack: How Hyperscalers Tie Into GPUs, ASICs, and CPUs

Goldman's $7.6T framework assumes a multi-architecture future. Here's who designs what, who manufactures what, and why the answer matters more than the headline.

The AI capex narrative is dominated by a single name “NVIDIA”. NVIDIA’s GPU dominance is real, but that’s not the full story.

The reality is more interesting and structurally important. Goldman Sachs Global Institute’s recent framework projects $7.6 trillion in AI capex from 2026-2031. 

Within that universe, the silicon stack is genuinely contested. Custom ASICs designed by $AVGO , $MRVL , and $Alchip are scaling at 50% CAGR. $AMD is growing share at the merchant GPU layer (SemiAnalysis projects AMD share doubling to ~10% by mid-2026). CPU-to-GPU ratios are shifting as agentic AI workloads change the compute mix over time.

Companies mentioned
$NVDA, $AMD, $AVGO, AIchip, $MRVL, Ayar Labs, Mediatek, $GOOG, $META, $AMZN, $MSFT

https://t.co/XukLuXRh2B

quoted_tweet.text:
$SMH (May 1, 2026-monthly chart)

How to identify the bullish (buy) signals?

If you know how to read my charts, the buy signals are actually very straightforward and have proven highly accurate in hindsight. 

I mainly rely on these three reliable signals:
(1) Upper Volatility Hole Breakout — When the price surpasses the upper boundary of the volatility hole (which I highlight in my posts), supported by a steady increase in whale accumulation.

(2) Momentum Bar Breakout — When the momentum bars are about to be cleared or have just been surpassed.

(3) Bullish Red Candles — The formation of strong bullish red candles.
